message:
Add NATS read buffer overflow protection and payload size guard

Propagate errors from read_buf.extend() to catch buffer capacity
exhaustion instead of silently growing. Add a MAX_READ_BUFFER guard
in MSG payload parsing that rejects server messages exceeding 8 MiB,
preventing OOM from malicious or misconfigured servers sending
oversized payloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
